sabotage_mechanism: Artificial suspension of torture investigation under Art. 287/3 CPP for over 25 years.
legal_counter: Invocation of Art. 166.1 (Torture) and Jus Cogens - no statute of limitations for crimes against humanity.
jus_cogens_impact: Violation of the duty to investigate (Art. 3 ECHR). State-sponsored impunity.
